Description.value: Client-side companion to the PackRelay launcher. When the launcher writes a `packrelay-quickjoin.json` sentinel into the userdatafolder before spawning 7DTD, this mod reads it on main-menu-ready and (in v0.2) drives the Direct Connect dialog automatically. v0.1 ships the scaffold + sentinel reader + verified Harmony hook on XUiC_MainMenu.OnOpen; the auto-click invoke lands in v0.2. Harmless on dedicated servers (XUiC code path doesn't fire server-side).
